description: Mack has a confrontation with Roxy, who points out Deke's loyalty and ongoing efforts to support Mack's younger self and family, misinterpreting them as his children. Suddenly, a Chronicom robot attacks Mack and Roxy, confirming the threat is very real and forcing them into combat.

transcript.line: Hey, hold up. I said “hold up”.
I don't need a lecture right now.
No, you need an ass-kicking. That was not cool.
Yeah, well, that's between me and Deke.
Maybe, but he's my buddy, and yours, too, the way he's always going on about you. “Mack's such a great guy. Best leader any team could have.” Man, did he have you pegged wrong.
It's not me you should feel sorry for. It's that kid of yours.
Don't play dumb. He looks just like you. Even has your name.
How do you know about him?
Deke checks in on him every couple weeks, brings him and his brother school supplies, toys, even got 'em a drum kit.
'Course not. You left that kid. What do you care? What's that robot doing here?
